problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Attention. Attention mechanism with linear complexity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
